lines.chords: C  G/B  D  C  G/B  D
C  G/B  D  C  G/B  D
lines.lyrics: I've been on a mission, finding your position

lines.chords: C  G/B  D  C  G/B  D
lines.lyrics: I know you have to be for real

lines.chords: C  G/B  D  C  G/B  D
lines.lyrics: Cause you are an addiction

lines.chords: C  G/B  D  C  G/B  D
lines.lyrics: And my intuitions will be fulfilled when you're revealed
All my life, searching for the answer
Out of sight but not too far
And I'm alright, waiting for your signals
To tell me who you are

lines.chords: C  G/B  D  C  G/B  D
lines.lyrics: In my exploration, I've crossed many nations

lines.chords: C  G/B  D  C  G/B  D
lines.lyrics: And felt you in the rising moon

lines.chords: C  G/B  D  C  G/B  D
lines.lyrics: I see you in rain clouds, your voice is calling out loud

lines.chords: C  G/B  D  C  G/B  D
lines.lyrics: Our souls will be colliding soon
All my life, you have been the answer
We're bound by light and sounds so clear
I can tell, it'll be forever
When you finally reappear
All right, all night, are you ready to be my destiny
All right, don't fight it, are you ready baby, it's meant to be
All right, all night, let me show the way and we'll be free
All right, all night, are you ready baby, it's ecstasy
